# crowci Provider

Terraform provider for Crow CI Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    crowci = {
      source = "registry.terraform.io/crowci/crowci"
    }
  }
}

provider "crowci" {
  host  = "https://ci.example.com"
  token = var.crowci_token
}

variable "crowci_token" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `host` (String) The base URL of the Crow CI API (e.g. https://ci.example.com). Falls back to CROWCI_HOST.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Personal access token used to authenticate against the Crow CI API. Falls back to CROWCI_TOKEN.
